name: lte-setup
description: [DEPRECATED — use the 'usb-net' module] LTE/router connectivity over USB ethernet. Superseded by usb-net, which ships the universal ASIX driver (incl. AX88772B/C) and an 'lte' mode that does the same DNS setup. The old 'AX88772B Override' never worked on io-net and has been removed.
author: dspl1236
